name: Dommo Energia S.A.
summary: Dommo Energia S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas in Brazil. The company's properties include BM-C-39, BM-C-40, and BM-C-41 located in the Campos basin. It also owns an interest in the BS-4 block located in the Santos basin.
